query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'contracts'
  AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'contracts'
  AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
installment_amount	decimal
payment_day	int
paid_installments	int
debt_type	varchar
raw_json	json
synced_at	timestamp
bad_debt_amount	decimal
bad_debt_date	varchar
suspended_from_period	int
bad_debt_updated_by	varchar
bad_debt_updated_at	varchar
